description: Submits a completed agent registration payload for risking. Accepts a SubmitForRiskingRequest JSON body containing the agent application and associated individuals, transforms it into an ApplicationForRisking record, and upserts it into MongoDB. Returns 201 Created on success.

responses.description: Created — the application for risking was successfully upserted.
Bad Request — JSON body failed to parse as SubmitForRiskingRequest.
Unauthorised — caller is not authenticated via Government Gateway as an Agent, or credential role is unsupported, or HMRC-AS-AGENT enrolment is already active.

authentication.notes: Rejects if HMRC-AS-AGENT enrolment is already active on the user. Retrieves internalId, allEnrolments, credentialRole.

interactions.action: Invoke AuthorisedAction — verify Government Gateway auth, AffinityGroup.Agent, credential role, and absence of HMRC-AS-AGENT enrolment

Convert SubmitForRiskingRequest to ApplicationForRisking model; map individuals to IndividualForRisking; determine CRN (only for LimitedCompany/LimitedPartnership/LLP/ScottishLimitedPartnership); set status=ReadyForSubmission; set createdAt=Instant.now()
Upsert ApplicationForRisking document into MongoDB (replaceOne with upsert=true, keyed on applicationReference)

externalDependencies.name: HMRC Auth Service
externalDependencies.purpose: Validate Government Gateway credentials and retrieve enrolments/credentialRole/internalId

specialCases: CRN is only populated for LimitedCompany, LimitedPartnership, LLP, and ScottishLimitedPartnership business types; all other types get null CRN.
PassedIV is mandatory on IndividualProvidedDetails; throws if missing.
Upsert semantics mean re-submission of the same applicationReference overwrites the existing record.
